# freepng2pdf.com – LLMs.txt

This file provides AI systems with a curated overview of the most important pages of freepng2pdf.com.  
All conversions run locally in the browser and no files are uploaded.

## Main Pages

- [Homepage](https://www.freepng2pdf.com/)  
  : Convert PNG to PDF or PDF to PNG offline in your browser. No uploads, no tracking.

- [German Version](https://www.freepng2pdf.com/de/)  
  : Deutsche Version des PNG‑zu‑PDF‑Konverters. Offline, sicher und kostenlos.

- [Blog](https://www.freepng2pdf.com/Blog/)  
  : Articles about file conversion, privacy, and offline tools.

## About the Tool

- Offline conversion using client‑side JavaScript  
- Supports PNG, JPG, JPEG → PDF  
- Supports PDF → PNG  
- No server processing, no data collection
